title: Grace's Will
description: Experence Grace's Will into your survival world
body:
**[ WORK IN PROGRESS ]**
Beta v2 progress: **89%**
Release progress: **73%**
**THIS MOD IS NOT DEAD**, its just so slow cuz Toxicisity (me) is the only one whos working here
**JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER TO SEE WHATS UPCOMING!** **A Mod inspired from Roblox Grace** Need some challenge? Need some lore? This mod adds Custom made **Grace** entites into your world > # Grace's Will > Adds entities that are inspired from **Roblox Grace** > They are not copy pasted entities, all Unifocals are original (i think)
> All Unifocals has a **different way to kill and dodge** from them
> All of them are **Animated** and Designed with **Aseprite** > **The whole mod has lore for each entity, to find them out you have to:** > - Check and find every document > - Search for clues and ways to find them > - Die from every entity and look at the death messages > - Find the notes..
Plans (May Change) ``` ---------------------------------[ New Beta v2 coming soon ]---------------------------------- + 2 Unifocals + Subtitles + Visual Effects + Sound Effects + More Musics + Revamped Some Unifocals + Reworked Unifocals Spawn Timings + Reworked Unifocals Spawn Rarity ! High Unifocals Spawn Rate, and High Unifocals's Rarity ! Fixed Common bugs ! Staruin Revamped ____________________________________________________________________________________ - Still Attempting to Optimize Staruin; Cuases mental lag [FIP, Fixing In Progress] - Staruin's empty notes Still not fixed [FIP] - Some bugs i dont know, that i didn't fix [____________________________________________________________________________________________] --------------------------------------[ Upcoming Beta v3 ]------------------------------------ ------------------------------------[ The Dawn Beta update ]---------------------------------- + 4 Unifocals + Death Animation for ALL Unifocal + More Docomments + MORE SOUNDTRACKS + Revamped Notes + Added lore + More Voicelines + Fixed bugs ! Difficulty Setting (ONE TIME CHANGE) ! Revamped? Subtitles ! Visual Effects ! Sound Effects ______________________________________________ - ??? [____________________________________________________________________________________________] --------------------------------------[ Upcoming Release ]------------------------------------ -----------------------------------[ Welcome to Grace's Will ]-------------------------------- + Final Boss + Secret Boss + 3 Unifocals + Rework Visual Effects + Full UI + Weapons - Special Items + Traits + Modifiers + Hazards + Docomments UI + Badges + Multiplayer Support + Lots of Animations + Structures ! Survivable ! World Dangerment ! Depths in lore ! Uncanny Vibes ! All Glitches/Bugs hopfully will be patched _____________________________________________________ - DIFFICULTY WILL BE ALWAYS ON: NO MERCY! - PEOPLE WITH FAST REACTIONS ARE RECOMMENDED [____________________________________________________________________________________________] ```
